title: Digital Engagement and Media
description: Connecting you to the U.S. Department of Energy
text: As technology changes, it’s important that the U.S. Department of Energy changes with it. Our Department is committed to meeting Americans where they’re at through innovative uses of digital media. Whether you’re looking to chat with us on social media, immerse yourself in people-centered storytelling through our podcast and video series, get money-saving tips through our newsletter, or more — this page can help you get plugged in.
